name: detector contract: --format sarif emits SARIF 2.1.0-conforming output
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --format sarif --paths "src/**/*.ts" | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);if(r.version==="2.1.0"&&Array.isArray(r.runs)){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: not a valid SARIF document\n");process.exit(1)}});'
setup: mkdir -p src && echo "const x: any = 1;" > src/a.ts
